title: The Passport (Second Amendment) Rules, 1971 (05.09.1971)
text: REGISTERED No. D. 221 The Gazette of India EXTRAORDINARY PART II—Section 3—Sub-section (I) PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY No. 167] NEW DELHI, WEDNESDAY, SEPTEMBER 15, 1971/BHADRA 34,1892 Separate paging is given to this Part in order that it may be filed as a separate compilation MINISTRY OF EXTERNAL AFFAIRS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 15th September 1971 G.S.R. 1344. :—In exercise of the powers conferred by section 24 of the Pass- ports Act, 1067, (15 of 1967), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Passport Rules, 1967. namely:— 1. These rules may be called the Passports (Second Amendment) Rules, 1971. 2. In Schedule II to the Passports Rules, 1967, under the heading "PART I- PASSPORTS", In column 2 against serial No. II relating to "Official Passport:?", (a) tor item (2), the following item shall be substituted, namely: — "(2) Officials of the Reserve Bank of India, the State Bank of India, national- ised banks and Corporations, Undertakings and any other Institutions owned or controlled by the State, holding the rank below that of Joint Secretary to the Government of India, proceeding out of India on official work, only if the Government of India considers it necessary to issue official passports to them in the interest of their functioning as such; and the members of their families when such members also proceed out of India at the expense of such organisations;" (889) -- 1 of 4 -- 890 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA EXTRAORDINARY [PART II— (b) in item (4) the following shall be added at the end, namely:— "and the members of the family of such an official deputed out of India for a period not less than "twelve months, when travelling with, or joining with such official at his post abroad;" (c) after item (5) and before the Note the following item shall be inserted, namely:— "(6) Any other person who, In the opinion of the Government of India, should an official passport because of the nature of his foreign Mission." [No. VI/401/104/70.] P. N. MENON. Secy. -- 2 of 4 -- SEC. (i)] THE GAZETTE OF INDIA EXTRAORDINARY 891 PRINTED BY THE GENERAL MANAGER, GOVERNMENT OF INDIA PRESS, MINTO ROAD, NEW DELHI AND PUBLISHED BY THE MANAGER Of PUBLICATIONS, DELHI, 1971 -- 3 of 4 -- -- 4 of 4 --
